eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Eagle, CO; at 8:03 AM on JUL 22, 2026 Effective until 11:03 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Pre-evacuations lifted for Hartman Hill Fire:
Due to successful firefighting operations on the Hartman Hill Fire, all pre-evacuation warnings in Grand and Eagle Counties have been lifted on the Trough Road/County Rd 1, including Sheephorn Creek Rd and Cottonwood Creek Rd (Zones RCV-281 and RCV-280) in Eagle County. Visit ECEmergency.org for more information.
